note: All 8 sites returned HTTP 403 from WebFetch — consistent with CDN/Cloudflare edge bot-detection blocking the sandbox IP. This is NOT a confirmed outage; SSL handshakes succeeded for all 8 domains via openssl s_client, confirming servers are live. SSL WARNING: all 8 certs show notAfter=Jun 7 12:03:xx 2026 GMT (29 days remaining). Yesterday's check showed Jun 6 expiry — the one-day shift (Jun 6 → Jun 7) may indicate Vercel/Let's Encrypt auto-renewal is in progress. Watch for a jump to ~90-day expiry in coming days to confirm renewal completed.
